competitorNews.title: Greenhouse March 2026 Release Notes
bullets: Refined Duplicate tag logic based on email, phone number, or LinkedIn URL instead of name/email matches
Hire Link for Workday® integration for automatic new hire data export
MyGreenhouse Stages for transparent, candidate-friendly hiring stage labels
competitorNews.workdayImplication: Greenhouse closing scheduling and integration gaps; our native Workday ecosystem remains a differentiator

competitorNews.title: iCIMS Spring Release 2026
bullets: Expands enterprise talent acquisition platform with iCIMS Frontline AI
competitorNews.workdayImplication: iCIMS frontline AI push mirrors our HiredScore play; watch for overlap in high-volume verticals

competitorNews.title: SmartRecruiters Unveils Winston AI Hiring Companion
bullets: Winston Interview: Agentic interviewer providing first-round screening with consistent scoring
Winston Chat: Embedded assessments and Q&As achieving up to 66% application completion rates
Winston Match: Enhanced candidate analysis with sub-scores for education, skills, and experience
Winston Companion: Conversational Q&A agent for recruiters and hiring managers
competitorNews.workdayImplication: SmartRecruiters agentic interviewing challenges our Paradox integration; we must emphasize HiredScore's enterprise scale
